SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS, ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS, ON PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JENNINGS, MARTHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TARANTINO, JOHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TARANTINO, JOHN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT JENNINGS, MARTHA $4,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENNINGS, MARTHA
SC-221 RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TARANTINO, JOHN

ORDER (SC-222)ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS - [X] THE COURT ORDERS [X] PAYMENTS OF $ 150.00 ON THE 1 ST. DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING DECEMBER 01, 2014 UNTIL FINAL PAYMENTS APRIL 01, 2017. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $ 151.00 [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENT IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT, IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT AND THE JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL.
